This update expands on the Standard Breakology Index like usual, actually shortening the
SBI charts and various other improvements such as adding The Eternal Tera Path as a valid path.
This update also re-enables commenting for non-editors, and adds two new editors.

feat(paths): Add “The Eternal Tera Path” as a recognized number path
